text:
問題なさそうね。
それでは今回の特訓はクリア。
完了としましょう。

武器に振り回されていた頃とは大違い。
上手く扱えているようね。

だけど、初心を忘れずに
研鑽を重ね続けていれば、誰でも
至る領域であるのもまた事実。

さらなる先へ至りたいのであれば
さらなる努力と特訓が必要よ。
そ

You've passed with flying colors, I see.
That marks another round of boot
camp complete.

You've come so far from barely being
able to swing your weapon. Now, it sings
in your grasp.

Never forget the mindset you had when you
were but a fledgling. Anyone can reach where
you are now as long as they apply themselves.

Reaching the next level will require even more
hard work and dogged persistence.
See you for the next boot camp.
